title: Lattice Sieving in Three Dimensions for Discrete Log in Medium Characteristic
relevance: Lattice sieving methodology transferable from NFS to SDS enumeration

title: On the Density of the Set of Known Hadamard Orders
relevance: Analyzes density of Hadamard orders achievable by products of Paley constructions; relevant to lattice-based enumeration

title: A database of constructions of Hadamard matrices
relevance: Comprehensive database confirming 668 as open order; relates to Riesel numbers

title: Implementing Hadamard Matrices in SageMath
relevance: SageMath implementations covering all known orders ≤ 1000; reference for validation
